title: Dye Depot
description: Enhances your Minecraft experience with 16 vibrant new dyes and various other tweaks
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55730dca078c5f5d993037782ca33c6c534df966.png)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccd731a59f2b97cc9189ceb9b073d0b61476424.png)

# About Dye Depot
Dye Depot introduces 16 new dyes to the game, expanding the color palette and offering more customization options. This influences fish colorations, banner making, sheep dying, animal collar tinting and much more!

It also refines the basic vanilla dye crafting system, making it more intuitive and user-friendly.

And lastly it brings to the game a built-in optional resource pack that further enhances dyes, changing `Light Blue` to `Sky`, `Light Gray` to `Ash` and upgrading the vanilla dye item textures.

## Mod-loader and Version
This mod is being developed for Fabric and Forge. No backports are planned.

## Compat
Dyes are a heavily hardcoded part of minecraft, this mod will definitely encounter some issues if played with other mods, such as missing textures or missing blocks. Compatibility will very slowly be supported, but in the mean time you could check out [unofficial compat](https://modrinth.com/collection/lEOSTaAI).

## Dye Crafting guide

```
Note: you don't need to follow this guide, you can just rely on the recipe book or JEI if you want
```

This chart is aimed to be a quick breakdown of how the crafting system works:
- The **Color Types** at the top are useful to understand what kind of dye you are working with and which colors you can turn it in. Each different Color set has these 4 variants, except the Grayscale one, that lacks a Tinted variant so `Ash/Light Gray` and `Gray` are treated like lighter and darker colors, not equivalents.
- The **Basic Crafting & Converting** part can be applied to all the hues and is a useful guide to understand how to turn a Light color into a Dark one, a Tinted into a Base one, etc. 
- The **Crafting Tinted Variants** section instead is just that, an explanation on how to obtain each Tinted dye, since they all have different crafting recipes.

![Dye crafting guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ce5245e7a0eca1af35051f3c5ada04be57e4230.png)
